SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-17-2004 Continued To Jul-12-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Trial DeNovo.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Andrew Dimitriou, Esq., for the Appeallant: Scott Holley, also present.
No appearance by the Respondent: David King.
10:10 am. - The Court continued this matter back to the Master Trail Calendar for July 12, 2004 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 206, for Mr. Dimitriou to serve notice of Appeal, time and place of hearing to the Respondent: Mr. King and the Labor Commissioner.
